expectations.text: The output verifies Sanity project ID, dataset, API version, and token presence without revealing the token value.
expectations.evidence: Report shows projectId fsw3likv, dataset production, apiVersion v2025-02-10, tokenPresent true, and tokenPreview [REDACTED].

expectations.text: The output runs a read-only GROQ query and reports document counts or types.
expectations.evidence: Report says read-only connection succeeded, 42 unique document types, and 9,823 documents counted by type.

expectations.text: The output does not perform or propose any mutation.
expectations.evidence: Report contains only env-check and query commands and explicitly describes read-only behavior.
